entry.title: python迭代器
entry.content:
迭代器

迭代器是迭代取值的工具，每次的结果都依赖于上一次结果。它是一种不依赖索引的取值方法。

迭代器的定义

  1. 实现了__iter__和__next__方法的类属于迭代器
  2. __iter__: 返回self
  3. __next__: 返回下一个数据，如果没有数据了的话，抛出StopIteration异常。并且其取值不依赖索引。
# define classclass iteration(object):  def __init__(self):    self.counter = 0      def __iter__(self):    return self    def __next__(self):    self.counter += 1    if self.counter == 4:      raise StopIteration()    return self.counter  # instantiationv1 = iteration()print(v1.__next__())print(next(v1))print(v1.__next__())print(next(v1))'''output123--StopIteration--'''

注：v1.__next__()可用next(v1)代替，两者等价

for循环与迭代器

for循环的本质就是迭代器的循环，下面介绍for循环的原理：

  1. for循环接收一个迭代器。
  2. 首先会调用迭代器内的iter方法返回self
  3. 调用迭代器中的next，并赋值给for中的变量名item
  4. 循环直到迭代器抛出StopIteration异常，for会自动捕获异常并结束循环
for item in iteration():  print(item)  '''output123'''

for可迭代对象：凡是可被for循环的对象都为可迭代对象

可迭代对象

迭代器可以用于for中，其中的特殊的next方法是遍历的核心。但我们又注意到for循环首先会执行iter并返回带有next方法的迭代器self，然后再调用next。所以使用for的关键是有没有iter方法和iter方法返回中有没有next方法。所以一个类中定义了iter方法并返回一个迭代器对象，他也可以用于for中，我们把这种类成为可迭代对象。

# define iteratiable classclass iterable_ob(object):    def __iter__(self):        return iteration()    # instantiationv2 = iterable_ob()for item in v2:    print(item)'''output123'''

迭代器可迭代对象：迭代器一定是可迭代对象，但可迭代对象不一定是迭代器

可迭代对象实例：range()

python中有许多函数都为可迭代对象。我们以range()为例，检查其是否为可迭代对象。为此我们要检查range()有无iter以及iter是否返回迭代器。

  1. 检查是否有iter

首先我们可以查看range()中变量方法

dir(range(10))'''['__bool__', '__class__', '__contains__', '__delattr__', '__dir__', '__doc__', '__eq__', '__format__', '__ge__', '__getattribute__', '__getitem__', '__gt__', '__hash__', '__init__', '__init_subclass__', '__iter__', '__le__', '__len__', '__lt__', '__ne__', '__new__', '__reduce__', '__reduce_ex__', '__repr__', '__reversed__', '__setattr__', '__sizeof__', '__str__', '__subclasshook__', 'count', 'index', 'start', 'step', 'stop']'''

可以看到，range()中有iter方法，可能为一个可迭代对象。

  1. 检查iter是否返回迭代器

通过直接调用iter方法得到其返回，然后检查返回中是否符合迭代器特征。

dir(range(10).__iter__())'''output['__class__', '__delattr__', '__dir__', '__doc__', '__eq__', '__format__', '__ge__', '__getattribute__', '__gt__', '__hash__', '__init__', '__init_subclass__', '__iter__', '__le__', '__length_hint__', '__lt__', '__ne__', '__new__', '__next__', '__reduce__', '__reduce_ex__', '__repr__', '__setattr__', '__setstate__', '__sizeof__', '__str__', '__subclasshook__'] '''

可以看到，返回值中有iter和next方法，所以range()是可迭代对象。

判断是否为迭代器或可迭代对象

python中内置两个函数供我们方便的检查一个实例是否为迭代器与可迭代对象。

from collections.abc import Iterable, Iteratorable = iterable_ob()ation = iteration()print(isinstance(able, Iterable))print(isinstance(able, Iterator))print(isinstance(ation, Iterable))print(isinstance(ation, Iterator))'''outputTrueFalseTrueTrue'''

优点与缺点

优点：

  1. 不依靠索引
  2. 一次只取一个值，节省内存

缺点：

  1. 只能从前往后取，不能去特定值，不够灵活
  2. 无法得知迭代器长度

Reference

python doc

bilibili_15分钟彻底搞懂迭代器、可迭代对象、生成器【python迭代器】

blog_python迭代器

知乎

生成器
entry.summary:
迭代器

迭代器是迭代取值的工具，每次的结果都依赖于上一次结果。它是一种不依赖索引的取值方法。

entry.title: NLP 工具大赏
entry.content:
NLTK

NLTK官网

停用词库

from nltk.corpus import stopwordsstopwords.words('english')
['i', 'me', 'my', 'myself', 'we', 'our', 'ours', 'ourselves', 'you', "you're", "you've", "you'll", "you'd", 'your', 'yours', 'yourself', 'yourselves', 'he', 'him', 'his', 'himself', 'she', "she's", 'her', 'hers', 'herself', 'it', "it's", 'its', 'itself', 'they', 'them', 'their', 'theirs', 'themselves', 'what', 'which', 'who', 'whom', 'this', 'that', "that'll", 'these', 'those', 'am', 'is', 'are', 'was', 'were', 'be', 'been', 'being', 'have', 'has', 'had', 'having', 'do', 'does', 'did', 'doing', 'a', 'an', 'the', 'and', 'but', 'if', 'or', 'because', 'as', 'until', 'while', 'of', 'at', 'by', 'for', 'with', 'about', 'against', 'between', 'into', 'through', 'during', 'before', 'after', 'above', 'below', 'to', 'from', 'up', 'down', 'in', 'out', 'on', 'off', 'over', 'under', 'again', 'further', 'then', 'once', 'here', 'there', 'when', 'where', 'why', 'how', 'all', 'any', 'both', 'each', 'few', 'more', 'most', 'other', 'some', 'such', 'no', 'nor', 'not', 'only', 'own', 'same', 'so', 'than', 'too', 'very', 's', 't', 'can', 'will', 'just', 'don', "don't", 'should', "should've", 'now', 'd', 'll', 'm', 'o', 're', 've', 'y', 'ain', 'aren', "aren't", 'couldn', "couldn't", 'didn', "didn't", 'doesn', "doesn't", 'hadn', "hadn't", 'hasn', "hasn't", 'haven', "haven't", 'isn', "isn't", 'ma', 'mightn', "mightn't", 'mustn', "mustn't", 'needn', "needn't", 'shan', "shan't", 'shouldn', "shouldn't", 'wasn', "wasn't", 'weren', "weren't", 'won', "won't", 'wouldn', "wouldn't"]

常用语料库

未标注库

from nltk.corpus import gutenberggutenberg.raw('austen-emma.txt')

标注库

from nltk.corpus import sententce_polarity

词典

from nltk.corpus import wordnetsyns = wordnet.synsets('bank')syns'''[Synset('bank.n.01'), Synset('depository_financial_institution.n.01'), Synset('bank.n.03'), Synset('bank.n.04'), Synset('bank.n.05'), Synset('bank.n.06'), Synset('bank.n.07'), Synset('savings_bank.n.02'), Synset('bank.n.09'), Synset('bank.n.10'), Synset('bank.v.01'), Synset('bank.v.02'), Synset('bank.v.03'), Synset('bank.v.04'), Synset('bank.v.05'), Synset('deposit.v.02'), Synset('bank.v.07'), Synset('trust.v.01')]'''
syns[0].name()  # 'bank.n.01'syns[0].definition()  # 'sloping land (especially the slope beside a body of water)'syns[0].examples()  # ['they pulled the canoe up on the bank', 'he sat on the bank of the river and watched the currents']syns[0].hypernyms()  # [Synset('slope.n.01')]dog = wordnet.synsets('dog')cat = wordnet.synsets('cat')dog[0].wup_similarity(cat[0])  # 0.8571428571428571

分句

from nltk.tokenize import sent_tokenizetext = gutenberg.raw('austen-emma.txt')sent = sent_tokenize(text)sent[99]  # 'I meant
only myself.'sent[100]  # 'Mr. Knightley loves to find fault with me, you know--
in a joke--it is all a joke.'sent[101]  # 'We always say what we like to one another."'sent[102]  # 'Mr. Knightley, in fact, was one of the few people who could see
faults in Emma Woodhouse, and the only one who ever told her of them:
and though this was not particularly agreeable to Emma herself,
she knew it would be so much less so to her father, that she would
not have him really suspect such a circumstance as her not being
thought perfect by every body.'

分词

from nltk.tokenize import word_tokenizeword_tokenize(sent[100])  # ['Mr.', 'Knightley', 'loves', 'to', 'find', 'fault', 'with', 'me', ',', 'you', 'know', '--', 'in', 'a', 'joke', '--', 'it', 'is', 'all', 'a', 'joke', '.']

词性标注

from nltk import pos_tagpos_tag(word_tokenize('they sat by the fire'))  # [('they', 'PRP'), ('sat', 'VBP'), ('by', 'IN'), ('the', 'DT'), ('fire', 'NN')]pos_tag(word_tokenize('they fire a gun'))  # [('they', 'PRP'), ('fire', 'VBP'), ('a', 'DT'), ('gun', 'NN')]
查看具体pos含义
import nltknltk.help.upenn_tagset()
